onboarding.title: DataForSEO API Integration
onboarding.subtitle: Search volume, SERP analysis, and keyword research
onboarding.sampleDataDescription: No sample data — this is a service template that calls the DataForSEO API.

steps.title: Configure API Keys
steps.description: Enter your DataForSEO login email and API password to connect to the API.

steps.title: Run Operations
steps.description: Use the form or ask your AI assistant to fetch search volume, analyze SERPs, or get keyword ideas.

steps.title: View Results
steps.description: Results are saved and viewable in the run history. Re-run any past operation with one click.

reference.overview: DataForSEO provides programmatic access to keyword data, SERP results, and more. This service template wraps the most commonly used endpoints.

concepts.name: Search Volume
concepts.description: Monthly search volume, CPC, and competition data for keywords from Google Ads.

concepts.name: SERP Analysis
concepts.description: Top organic search results for a keyword, including URLs, titles, and positions.

concepts.name: Keyword Suggestions
concepts.description: Related keyword ideas based on a seed keyword, with volume and competition metrics.

prompts: Get search volume for 'camping gear' and 'hiking boots'
Analyze the top 10 Google results for 'best project management tools'
Find keyword suggestions related to 'electric vehicles'
Compare search volume for 'react vs vue vs angular'
tips: You can look up to 50 keywords at once with search-volume
Use location codes to get data for specific countries (2840 = US, 2826 = UK)
SERP analysis shows the actual current Google results, not historical data
All results are saved in run history — you can reference past results anytime
